file_insights.content: term_width() function and libc_ioctl FFI helper
file_insights.reason: Extracted to util.rs for shared usage

file_insights.purpose: Import extracted function from util module

file_insights.content: term_width() function with platform-specific ioctl and fallback logic
file_insights.purpose: Centralized terminal width detection for shared usage across modules
Gitignore configuration for sensitive build artifacts
Update QEMU adapter for Unikraft zam unikernel boot path

patterns_discovered.description: Terminal width detection uses platform-specific ioctl values (macOS: 0x40087468, Linux: 0x5413)
patterns_discovered.context: Unified approach handles multiple Unix variants within single function via #[cfg] guards

patterns_discovered.description: Three-tier detection strategy: ioctl → COLUMNS env var → hardcoded default (100)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Works in constrained environments (Zellij panes, tmux, CI systems)

patterns_discovered.description: libc_ioctl helper wraps extern C ioctl call with proper platform guards and MaybeUninit safety
patterns_discovered.note: Properly scoped to Unix targets only via #[cfg(unix)]

patterns_discovered.description: Moving shared utility function from module-specific file (gantt.rs) to common util.rs
patterns_discovered.outcome: Enables usage across multiple modules without code duplication

gotchas_discovered.detail: TIOCGWINSZ differs between macOS (0x40087468) and Linux (0x5413); requires separate compile-time constants
gotchas_discovered.impact: Missing platform guard would cause silent fallback on wrong OS

gotchas_discovered.detail: libc_ioctl redeclares ioctl extern function; must ensure declaration matches actual libc signature
gotchas_discovered.risk: Incorrect calling convention or parameter types could cause undefined behavior

gotchas_discovered.detail: Struct must use #[repr(C)] to match C layout for ioctl result; default Rust layout would be incompatible
gotchas_discovered.impact: Without repr(C), ioctl buffer would be misaligned

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: COLUMNS env var may be stale
gotchas_discovered.detail: Fallback to COLUMNS env doesn't detect actual terminal resize within same process
gotchas_discovered.note: Only ioctl refresh detects live terminal changes

approach_details.task: Extract term_width() from gantt.rs to util.rs for shared usage
changes: Moved 44-line term_width() function from gantt.rs to util.rs
Moved 7-line libc_ioctl FFI helper to util.rs
Updated gantt.rs import to use crate::util::term_width
Preserved all platform-specific guards and safety semantics

recommendations.suggestion: Add unit tests for term_width() in util.rs
recommendations.rationale: Moved function should have dedicated tests; critical for cross-platform compatibility

recommendations.suggestion: Document ioctl constants in code comments
recommendations.rationale: Magic numbers (0x40087468, 0x5413) should include reference to TIOCGWINSZ definition source

recommendations.suggestion: Consider using libc crate instead of raw extern
recommendations.rationale: libc::ioctl and libc::TIOCGWINSZ would eliminate hardcoded constants and improve maintainability
recommendations.note: Current approach is valid but adds maintenance burden for platform constants

recommendations.suggestion: Cache term_width result with optional refresh mechanism
recommendations.rationale: Function may be called frequently; one-time cache could improve performance in hot paths
